ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the mutation occurred */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the mutation on the chromosome */,
  "ref_counts" INTEGER /* Reference counts for the mutation */,
  "var_counts" INTEGER /* Variant counts for the mutation */,
  "normal_cn" INTEGER /* Normal copy number */,
  "minor_cn" INTEGER /* Minor copy number */,
  "mut_cn" INTEGER /* Mutation copy number */,
  "major_cn" INTEGER /* Major copy number */,
  "total_cn" INTEGER /* Total copy number */,
  "trinucleotide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trinucleotide context of the mutation */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation of the mutation */,
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_mutation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_type_id") REFERENCES mutation_types ("mutation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_trinucleotide_id FOREIGN KEY ("trinucleotide_id") REFERENCES trinucleotides ("trinucleotide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Genome assembly (e.g., GRCh37, GRCh38) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations_genes" (
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "mutation_gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the mutation-gene relationship (e.g., synonymous, non-synonymous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing run */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Sequencing technology used (e.g., Illumina, PacBio) */,
  "pipeline" TEXT /* Pipeline used for data analysis */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of library prepared (e.g., DNA, RNA) */,
  "read_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequencing reads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing data */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequencing run */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sequencing data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the sequencing data in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the sequencing data (e.g., BAM, FASTQ) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control status (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_data_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sequencing_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_data_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the mutation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., IP address, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., SBS48-target) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., literature, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation type */,
  "mutation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation type (e.g., SBS48) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the mutation type (e.g., substitution, insertion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trinucleotides" (
  "trinucleotide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trinucleotide */,
  "trinucleotide_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the trinucleotide (e.g., CTA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trinucleotide */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the trinucleotide (e.g., codon, non-codon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trinucleotide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "copy_number_variations" (
  "cnv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each copy number variation */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation being associated with the CNV */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the CNV occurred */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the CNV on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the CNV on the chromosome */,
  "copy_number" INTEGER /* Copy number of the CNV */,
  "cnv_type" TEXT /* Type of the CNV (e.g., amplification, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cnv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_copy_number_variations_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_copy_number_variations_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being expressed */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation being associated with the gene expression */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Level of the gene expression */,
  "expression_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene expression (e.g., RNA, protein) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_publications" (
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id", "publication_id")
)
